narrative:
Cols 36-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 980 registered voters, with 68.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.5 percentage points.
